title: Toward the Prime Heart
summary: After breaking the siege in the Inner Frontier, the Guardian leads the player to the Heartbound Passage, a hidden corridor that connects Sector Two to the Prime Heart’s domain. The corruption has fortified the passage with Heartbound Sentinels. The player must clear the passage, stabilize its resonance, and prepare for the final convergence.
steps: Follow the Guardian to the Heartbound Passage
Protect your Cyberkin from resonance drain
objectives: Follow the Guardian to the Heartbound Passage
Protect your Cyberkin from resonance drain
rewards: Access to the Prime Heart’s outer domain
